what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that associates attachment att-89a3116f with board item item-7049ae69 in the dragnet-development channel and records when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
The id in the frontmatter matches the filename stem.
standouts: Typed link to a board item via a board:// URI
Attachment metadata with no embedded payload
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Target referenced with a board:// URI scheme
Timestamp in ISO 8601 format with timezone
concerns: No payload or description of what the attachment actually contains
Target board item cannot be verified from this file alone
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub that points to a board item but carries no content payload.
questions: What data or artifact does this attachment represent?
Who or what process added this attachment?
Is the referenced board item still valid?
purpose_vs_actual: The file behaves as expected for an attachment metadata record: it identifies the attachment, channel, type, target board item, and creation time.
intention_signals: It appears intended to log that a particular board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel memory at a specific time.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI as the target reference in an otherwise conventional YAML attachment metadata file.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed edge between an attachment identifier and a board item, supporting lookup and audit without embedding the payload.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata file linking attachment att-89a3116f to board item item-7049ae69 in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a board item attachment exists in the dragnet-development channel memory at a specific point in time.
